requirements.statement: When a subscription renews, charge the saved payment method at the current plan price.
When a subscription renews, charge the saved payment method at the current plan price, prorating mid-cycle plan changes.
requirements.why: Revenue path; proration was the gap that drove the supersession.

requirements.statement: When a charge fails, retry on a schedule and notify the customer.
requirements.why: Dunning; silent failure churns the customer.

requirements.statement: When a charge is made, compute tax per region at charge time.
